title: Croptopia Refabricated
body:
# Croptopia Refabricated

This is a fabric-only maintenance fork of Thonk's excellent mod, Croptopia:

https://github.com/ExcessiveAmountsOfZombies/Croptopia

I'm just keeping it up-to-date with the latest minecraft versions for now
until Thonk has time to work on it again.


## Notes

* **THIS MIGHT HAVE BUGS.** I didn't write this mod; I'm just keeping it
up-to-date with the latest minecraft builds.  You should test it on a backup world first.
* I mainly built this for myself because I wanted to upgrade my server
and Croptopia was the last must-have mod that wasn't getting updating.
* This is fabric-only; I lack the time and expertise to
also maintain the forge version.
* The guidebook is going to be broken until Patchouli gets an update.

## Questions?

If you have questions about this fork, please ask on my Discord server:

[https://discord.pcal.net](https://discord.pcal.net)

I will not reply to comments on CurseForge.
